patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -1,15 +1,17 @@
-/* Bootloader Communication Protocol - boot_proto.h */
+/* Bootloader Communication Protocol - boot_proto.h (BREAKING: command values changed) */
 #ifndef BOOT_PROTO_H
 #define BOOT_PROTO_H
 
 #include <stdint.h>
 
-#define BOOT_CMD_ERASE      0x01U
-#define BOOT_CMD_WRITE      0x02U
-#define BOOT_CMD_READ       0x03U
-#define BOOT_CMD_VERIFY     0x04U
-#define BOOT_CMD_RESET      0x05U
-#define BOOT_CMD_GET_INFO   0x06U
+/* BREAKING: command byte values reassigned - host tools will send wrong commands */
+#define BOOT_CMD_GET_INFO   0x01U  /* was 0x06 */
+#define BOOT_CMD_ERASE      0x02U  /* was 0x01 */
+#define BOOT_CMD_WRITE      0x03U  /* was 0x02 */
+#define BOOT_CMD_READ       0x04U  /* was 0x03 */
+#define BOOT_CMD_VERIFY     0x05U  /* was 0x04 */
+#define BOOT_CMD_RESET      0x06U  /* was 0x05 */
+#define BOOT_CMD_LOCK       0x07U  /* new */
 
 #define BOOT_ACK            0xAAU
 #define BOOT_NACK           0x55U
